screening_summary: Medium screening risk in this clip; mixed or limited cues suggest further review.
risk_control_suggestions: Repeat screening with clearer audio/video or a structured task.

visit_recommendation: Consider formal cognitive screening or clinician review if concerns persist.
future_risk_trend_summary: Insufficient longitudinal data to predict future cognitive risk trend from a single clip.
disclaimer: Research demo only. This output is not a diagnosis and must not be used as a standalone medical decision.
